meta.title: ICS Security Press Panel on S4x18 Main Stage
meta.description:
Dale Peterson interviewed two reporters and editors who have covered the ICS security space for years: Kelly Jackson Higgins of Dark Reading and Jim Finkle of Reuters.

We cover a lot including:
- who is their target reader?
- why vuln and attack stories are the vast % of what is written (the clicks drive what they cover)? 
- Are they traffickers in FUD?
- when will vuln and attack stories stop getting clicks?
- the marketing strategy ... find a vuln and pitch it to the press.
- how do you decide whether to run a story on the vuln?
- how long do they have to write a story?
- what's makes a good pitch to a reporter? a bad pitch?
- what are the off the record rules? background rules?
